creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Wed Aug 21 14:42:17 2013
New Revision: 325141
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325141

Log:
  Netlib is a collection of network utility classes,
  used by the pathod and mitmproxy projects.
  
  It differs from other projects in some fundamental
  respects, because both pathod and mitmproxy often
  need to violate standards.
  
  WWW: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/netlib
  
  PR:		ports/180746
  Submitted by:	Hung-Yi Chen <gaod hychen.org>

Added:
  head/net/py-netlib/
  head/net/py-netlib/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/py-netlib/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/py-netlib/files/
  head/net/py-netlib/files/patch-setup.py   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/py-netlib/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/py-netlib/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/net/Makefile

Modified: head/net/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/Makefile	Wed Aug 21 14:26:07 2013	(r325140)
+++ head/net/Makefile	Wed Aug 21 14:42:17 2013	(r325141)
@@ -924,6 +924,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-ndg_httpsclient
     SUBDIR += py-netaddr
     SUBDIR += py-netifaces
+    SUBDIR += py-netlib
     SUBDIR += py-netstring
     SUBDIR += py-novaclient
     SUBDIR += py-oauth

Added: head/net/py-netlib/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/py-netlib/Makefile	Wed Aug 21 14:42:17 2013	(r325141)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Created by: Hung-Yi Chen <gaod@hychen.org>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	netlib
+PORTVERSION=	0.9.1
+CATEGORIES=	net python
+MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_CHEESESHOP}
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+
+MAINTAINER=	gaod@hychen.org
+COMMENT=	Collection of network utilities
+
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}asn1>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-asn1 \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}openssl>0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-openssl
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/net/py-netlib/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/py-netlib/distinfo	Wed Aug 21 14:42:17 2013	(r325141)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (netlib-0.9.1.tar.gz) = 559d3e842e39660e83493e46872966bc63a4a58fc4cbb2bf4ec2ca2b3cd880a6
+SIZE (netlib-0.9.1.tar.gz) = 58851

Added: head/net/py-netlib/files/patch-setup.py
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/py-netlib/files/patch-setup.py	Wed Aug 21 14:42:17 2013	(r325141)
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+--- setup.py.orig	2013-07-23 03:39:16.157592949 +0800
++++ setup.py	2013-07-23 03:39:30.392145219 +0800
+@@ -88,5 +88,4 @@
+             "Topic :: Software Development :: Testing :: Traffic Generation",
+             "Topic :: Internet :: WWW/HTTP",
+         ],
+-        install_requires=["pyasn1>0.1.2", "pyopenssl>=0.12"],
+ )

Added: head/net/py-netlib/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net/py-netlib/pkg-descr	Wed Aug 21 14:42:17 2013	(r325141)
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+Netlib is a collection of network utility classes,
+used by the pathod and mitmproxy projects.
+
+It differs from other projects in some fundamental
+respects, because both pathod and mitmproxy often
+need to violate standards.
+
+WWW: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/netlib
